Contributing to dissmapr

Source: .github/CONTRIBUTING.md

First off, thanks for considering contributing to dissmapr!

Code of Conduct

Please note that this project is released with a Contributor Code of Conduct. By participating in this project you agree to abide by its terms.

How to contribute

Report a bug or suggest an enhancement

If you find a bug or have an idea for an enhancement, please open an issue and describe:

  • For bugs: what you expected to happen, what actually happened, and a minimal reproducible example.
  • For enhancements: a clear description of the proposed feature and its motivation.

Contribute code

  1. Fork the repository and clone your fork.
  2. Create a new branch from main for your changes.
  3. Make your changes, following the coding guidelines below.
  4. Run devtools::check() and ensure there are no errors, warnings, or notes.
  5. Push your branch and open a pull request against main.

Coding guidelines

  • Follow the tidyverse style guide.
  • Use snake_case for function and variable names.
  • Use explicit namespace calls (package::function()) rather than @import.
  • Do not use library(), cat(), or print() in package code.
  • Add roxygen2 documentation with @return and @examples for every exported function.
  • Add unit tests using testthat for new functionality.

Development setup

# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("b-cubed-eu/dissmapr")
devtools::load_all()
devtools::test()
devtools::check()

On this page
